response.global_analysis:
1. Audio & Vocal Detection: Spoken/sung vocals detected in the JOYSOUND promo (00:09 - 00:23) and the Yoshinoya commercial (00:42 - 00:57). No other spoken/vocal tracks were present in the rest of the video (which consists of instrumental music and silent on-screen text slides).
2. JSON Usage & Transcription: Transcribed Japanese speech and lyrics accurately for these active audio segments.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles to align precisely with the vocal events. The rapid transition in the commercials has been handled using quick start/end timestamps to avoid overlapping.

subtitles.original: アニメにハマって、歌いたくなっちゃった！
subtitles.english: I got hooked on anime, and now I really want to sing!

subtitles.original: 推しのシーン見ながらカラオケ歌えるなんて…
subtitles.english: To think I can sing karaoke while watching my favorite scenes...

subtitles.original: 歌いたいアニゲーソング見つけよう！
subtitles.english: Let's find the anime and game songs you want to sing!

subtitles.original: 元祖の本気、召し上がれ。牛丼は吉野家。
subtitles.english: Taste the dedication of the original. Yoshinoya is the place for beef bowls.
